_comment: GENERATED by scripts/build-category-blitz-letter-index.cjs — do not hand-edit. Add categories to category-pool.json, then run `npm run category-blitz:build`. letters[L] lists every pool category with ≥threshold common answers starting with L. usableLetters are the only letters a round may draw (they have ≥setSize categories).
